description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image 4lt4/gif2spr-build with a single stage named build. Add a build-linux job in the build stage that runs the command `make`. Add a build-windows job in the same stage that runs `make TARGET_PLAT=win32 win-gui`, and configure it to publish artifacts named `gif2spr-$CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME` containing gif2spr.exe, gif2spr-gui.exe, LICENSE.txt, LICENSE_3rd_party, README.md, and THANKS.md. No caches or special rules are defined.
